business.name: Fairhope Fence Company LLC
business.tagline: Built to last, priced to sell

hero.headline: The fence crew *Mobile trusts*
hero.subheadline: Perfect fences from day one — no callbacks, no shortcuts, no excuses.

services_section.label: WHAT WE BUILD
services_section.heading: Every fence type, done right
services_section.subheading: From privacy to picket, we handle the full job

services.title: Privacy Fencing
services.description: Wood and vinyl privacy fences that actually stay private. No gaps, no sagging, no shortcuts.

services.title: Picket Fencing
services.description: Classic picket fences built with quality materials. Posts that won't lean, boards that won't warp.

services.title: Gate Installation
services.description: Custom gates that swing smooth and latch tight. Single, double, and specialty configurations.

services.title: Fence Repair
services.description: Fix what's broken, replace what's beyond saving. We'll make your old fence work like new.

about.heading: Mobile's fence specialists
about.body: We're the Mobile fence company that shows up when promised and builds it right the first time. One crew, one standard.

reviews.name: Paula S.
reviews.text: Excellent workmanship rebuilding my fence section at a very fair price. Recommend 100 percent!

reviews.name: Adam M.
reviews.text: Jack and his crew were outstanding! Great attention to detail and respect for our property. Our fence looks amazing.

reviews.name: leeanne s.
reviews.text: Completed a 300+ foot privacy fence. Great price, on time, and top quality hardware. Attention to detail is superb.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Mobile & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional fence installation across the Gulf Coast

cta.heading: Ready for a fence that lasts?
cta.body: Free estimates on all fence projects. We'll walk your property line and give you honest pricing upfront.
